title: Lead Developer & Full-Stack Engineer
description: I am a Lead Full-Stack Developer specializing in architecting high-performance web applications and scalable content management systems. Currently, I serve as a Team Lead for a dedicated web development structure, where I direct a team of 6 developers, establish development lifecycles, and design custom internal tools and APIs to power our client websites.

skills.title: Engineering Leadership
skills.description: Architectural oversight and team management. I direct cross-functional development teams, establish robust web development processes, and design custom APIs to align high-performance engineering with business objectives.

skills.title: Full-Stack Execution
skills.description: Bridging design and scalable deployment. With deep expertise across modern JavaScript frameworks, custom WordPress ecosystems, and enterprise CMS platforms, I build dynamic frontends and robust backends from the ground up.

skills.title: Automation & Optimization
skills.description: Eliminating friction through systems engineering. I leverage workflow automation, build efficient CI/CD pipelines, and implement data tracking to streamline operational workflows and maximize platform performance.
